acceptance_criteria.text: XLayerHttpException rethrown as OnChainOSException with previous chained.

acceptance_criteria.text: Malformed upstream response throws OnChainOSException with 'malformed' substring.
proof: createCharge throws OnChainOSException('malformed xlayer response') when session_id or status missing; throws OnChainOSException('malformed xlayer response status') when status outside {pending,failed,completed}.

acceptance_criteria.text: Auth failure throws OnChainOSException with 'auth' substring; no credentials leaked.
proof: Catch block detects '401', '403', 'unauthorized', 'forbidden' and throws OnChainOSException('auth failure', 0, $e).
test_auth_failure_throws_without_leaking_credentials walks getPrevious() chain and asserts none of sk-api-key-REDACTED, sk-secret-key-REDACTED, passphrase-REDACTED appear.
Client never embeds $apiKey/$secretKey/$passphrase into exception messages.
